features.title: News schema + Repository + alembic migration + NewsSnapshotWriter + NewsAdapter Protocol
features.acceptance: (1) workbench_api/db/models/news.py: News SQLAlchemy 2.0 declarative 模型 按 spec §4.2 schema (id UUID PK / source / source_id / url / title / summary / ticker / form_type / published_at / fetched_at / snapshot_path / content_sha256 / ticker_mentions JSONB) + __repr__；(2) workbench_api/db/repositories/news.py: NewsRepository(Repository[News, UUID]) save_if_new (idempotent by (source, source_id) 返回 None 当 dup) + list_by_ticker(ticker, since, limit) + list_by_source(source, since, limit) + get_by_source_and_source_id；(3) workbench_api/db/migrations/versions/0005_b033_news.py: alembic up/down create_table news + 3 indexes (source, ticker, published_at) + uq_news_source_source_id, down_revision='0004_b031_llm_budget_log'；alembic upgrade head → downgrade -1 可逆；(4) workbench_api/news/__init__.py stub + workbench_api/news/snapshot.py NewsSnapshotWriter(root: Path) 写 data/snapshots/news/{source}/{YYYY-MM-DD}/ + return (relative_path, content_sha256) + mkdir -p；(5) workbench_api/news/adapters/__init__.py + base.py: NewsItem dataclass(frozen, slots) + NewsAdapter Protocol；(6) pytest ≥10: NewsRepository CRUD + save_if_new 幂等性 (两次同 source_id 第二次返回 None) / list_by_ticker since 过滤 / list_by_source limit / NewsSnapshotWriter 写文件正确 + sha256 / mkdir -p 行为 / **永久边界 (p) 守门 tests/safety/test_news_schema_metadata_only.py**: inspect News.__table__.columns 不含 raw_text / body / content TEXT column / alembic up/down 测试模式参 tests/unit/test_alembic_*；(7) Gates: backend pytest ≥528 (B032 baseline 513 + ≥15) / ruff exit=0 / mypy exit=0 / alembic upgrade head OK + downgrade -1 OK / frontend 不动 vitest ≥172 + Playwright ≥38；(8) 不动 既有 B025-B032 表 / endpoint / strategy / Frontend / B026 banner decommissioned / AI Safety Eval workflow (本批次 paths 不命中).

features.title: SEC EDGAR adapter (10-K / 10-Q / 8-K + Form 4)
features.acceptance: (1) workbench_api/news/adapters/sec_edgar.py: SECEdgarNewsAdapter(NewsAdapter), source='sec_edgar'；(2) fetch(ticker, since): User-Agent 复用 SEC_EDGAR_CONTACT_EMAIL (config.settings) + rate limit 10 req/sec (token bucket，可复用 B029 _sec_edgar_throttle 或新独立 module) + 调 https://data.sec.gov/submissions/CIK{cik:010d}.json 列 filings + 按 form_type ∈ {'10-K','10-Q','8-K','4'} 过滤 + published_at >= since 过滤 + 每条 filing fetch 主文档 (.htm 或 .xml) build NewsItem(raw_body, raw_ext) + 落库 NewsRepository.save_if_new + snapshot 落 data/snapshots/news/sec_edgar/{YYYY-MM-DD}/{accession_no}.{htm,xml}；(3) CIK lookup 复用 B029 既有 resolver；(4) Synthetic ZQ* ticker: log warn + 返回空 iterator (B029 §3 一致)；(5) data/fixtures/news/edgar-sample-*.json: ≥3 fixture (10-K AAPL / 8-K NVDA / Form 4 MSFT) + 至少一份主文档 raw body sample；(6) pytest ≥8: adapter mock httpx 返回 fixture → 落库 + snapshot 正确 / form type filter (fixture 含 noise S-1 / 13F 断言被滤) / rate limit respect (mock + 时间断言 ≥0.1s 间隔) / User-Agent header 含 SEC_EDGAR_CONTACT_EMAIL / Synthetic ZQ* skip + log warn / since 过滤 (published_at < since 不入库)；(7) **第三方 API live-validate 建议** (参 B031 F003 fix-round 1 教训): generator 实施时至少手 hit 一次真实 https://data.sec.gov/submissions/CIK0000320193.json (AAPL) 验证 JSON envelope + 关键字段路径，写守门 unit test 锁住；(8) Gates: backend pytest ≥536 (F001 后 528 + ≥8) / ruff / mypy / **不引入新 secret** (grep .env.example / config.py / deploy.sh / bootstrap-env.yml 无新增条目)；(9) 不动 F001 schema / Yahoo adapter (留 F003) / 既有 B029 SECEDGARFundamentalsLoader (本批次走独立 /submissions/ endpoint) / B032 AI Safety Eval workflow.

features.title: Yahoo Finance RSS adapter + CLI 入口 + 永久边界 (q) 守门
features.acceptance: (1) workbench_api/news/adapters/yahoo_rss.py: YahooRSSNewsAdapter(NewsAdapter), source='yahoo_rss'；(2) fetch(ticker, since): 调 https://feeds.finance.yahoo.com/rss/2.0/headline?s={ticker}&region=US&lang=en-US；feedparser.parse(httpx.get(...).content); published_at 来自 RSS <pubDate>；落库 + snapshot data/snapshots/news/yahoo_rss/{YYYY-MM-DD}/{sha256(guid)[:16]}.xml；(3) workbench/backend/pyproject.toml runtime deps 加 feedparser>=6.0,<7 (v0.9.29 §12.8 runtime-vs-dev hygiene)；(4) tests/safety/test_critical_runtime_deps_pinned.py 扩集加 feedparser；(5) workbench_api/news/cli.py argparse fetch subcommand: --source ∈ {edgar,yahoo,all} 默认 all / --ticker 单 ticker 或全 universe / --since YYYY-MM-DD 默认 30 天前 / --form-types 默认 '10-K,10-Q,8-K,4'；CLI dispatch 到 SECEdgarNewsAdapter / YahooRSSNewsAdapter；启动时 mkdir -p data/snapshots/news/{source}；(6) data/fixtures/news/yahoo-sample-*.xml: ≥2 fixture (AAPL + SPY)；(7) data/snapshots/news/README.md: 目录用途 + .gitignore 已含 data/snapshots/ 验证 + 生产 CLI 入口 + B034 后续 cron 决议；(8) pytest ≥8: Yahoo adapter mock httpx + feedparser fixture → 落库正确 / CLI argparse 各 flag / CLI dispatch --source=all 跑两 adapter / CLI dispatch --source=edgar --form-types 10-K 只过 10-K / **永久边界 (q) 守门 tests/safety/test_news_no_scheduler.py**: workbench_api/news/scheduler.py 不存在 + workbench_api/news/ 下任意 .py 不 import apscheduler / aiocron / schedule / feedparser deps test extended；(9) Gates: backend pytest ≥544 (F002 后 536 + ≥8) / ruff / mypy / **不引入新 secret** / Frontend 不动；(10) 不动 F001 schema / F002 EDGAR adapter / 既有 strategy / B031 LLMGateway / B032 AI Safety Eval workflow.

features.title: Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收 + signoff
features.acceptance: L1 (CI 内): F001+F002+F003 全 generator 验收脚本跑通 — backend pytest ≥544 / ruff / mypy / alembic upgrade head OK + downgrade -1 OK；**永久边界 (l)(m)(n)(o)(p)(q) 守门全过** (含本批次新增 test_news_schema_metadata_only + test_news_no_scheduler)；feedparser runtime dep 守门 (test_critical_runtime_deps_pinned)；Frontend 不动 vitest ≥172 + Playwright ≥38 不破；AI Safety Eval workflow 不破 (本批次未触 LLM module，paths-trigger 不命中)；safety regression 全绿 (含 v0.9.29 §12.8 + v0.9.30 §12.9 + v0.9.31 §16 §22)；artifact grep SEC_EDGAR_CONTACT_EMAIL value / AIGC_GATEWAY_API_KEY value / 任何 raw filing text 泄漏 = 0 命中. L2 (真 VM): (1) Production VM 不动 (本批次仅 schema migration alembic up + CLI 不上 cron)；(2) curl https://trade.guangai.ai/api/health 200 + version SHA 与 main HEAD 等价；(3) curl https://trade.guangai.ai/api/debug/recent-errors 返回 {count:0,records:[]}；(4) B026 banner 仍 decommissioned 不破 (HTML grep '研究原型' / 'SyntheticDataBanner' 0 hits in /strategies /reports /recommendations /risk)；(5) **Production DB alembic head = '0005_b033_news'** (VM ssh + alembic current 验证)；(6) Production HEAD ≡ main HEAD (v0.9.25 §Production/HEAD 等价性)；(7) **Production VM 没有 workbench_api/news/scheduler.py** + crontab 无 news fetch entry + systemd 无 news fetch unit (永久边界 (q) L2 验证)；(8) **Production VM data/snapshots/news/ 目录存在但为空** (deploy 后 mkdir -p；本批次不跑 CLI fetch)；(9) Post-signoff Deploy 段 (v0.9.27 §21). Signoff: docs/test-reports/B033-news-ingest-signoff-2026-MM-DD.md 用 framework/templates/signoff-report.md (含 v0.9.27 §Post-signoff Deploy + v0.9.31 §Decommission Checklist '本批次不含 decommission' + §Production/HEAD)；docs/screenshots/B033-news-ingest/ ≥2 PNG (CLI fetch dry-run 输出 + alembic current 显示 0005_b033_news). Framework 候选: 预期无重大；若 fix-round 出现 schema/migration / feedparser type stubs / Yahoo RSS endpoint drift / SEC EDGAR /submissions/ envelope drift 等坑，记 signoff §Framework Learnings (尤其 B031 F003 fix-round 1 第三方 API live-validate 候选若本批次撞同样问题，达成「二例合并」沉淀 v0.9.32 条件，由当时 Planner 在 done 阶段沉淀). 更新 progress.json status→done / docs.signoff / evaluator_feedback.
